g.title: leaderContract
g.text:
<<core interface>>
LeaderElector
+ runIfLeader(lockName): T?
+ runAsyncIfLeader(lockName)
+ state(lockName): LeaderState

g.title: suspendContract
g.text:
<<core suspend interface>>
SuspendLeaderElector
+ suspend runIfLeader(lockName)
+ runIfLeaderResultSuspend(slot)
coroutine context handle

g.title: groupContract
g.text:
<<core group interface>>
LeaderGroupElector
+ maxLeaders: Int
+ runIfLeader(lockName): T?
+ activeCount / availableSlots

g.title: suspendGroupContract
g.text:
<<core suspend group>>
SuspendLeaderGroupElector
+ maxLeaders: Int
+ suspend runIfLeader(lockName)
+ state(lockName): LeaderGroupState

g.title: lettuceLeader
g.text:
<<blocking + async implementation>>
LettuceLeaderElector
StatefulRedisConnection<String,String>
creates LettuceLock
autoExtend watchdog optional
optional history recorder

g.title: singleDelegates
g.text:
<<renewal delegates>>
Single Extend Delegates
LettuceLockExtendDelegate
LettuceSuspendLockExtendDelegate
share lock with LeaderLockHandle
R2 watchdog skip deadline

g.title: lettuceSuspend
g.text:
<<coroutine implementation>>
LettuceSuspendLeaderElector
uses Lettuce async commands
creates LettuceSuspendLock
withContext(handle element)
NonCancellable unlock

g.title: lettuceGroup
g.text:
<<slot-token group implementation>>
LettuceLeaderGroupElector
reuses slotGroups map
creates LettuceSlotTokenGroup
token becomes slotId
group watchdog disabled

g.title: slotDelegates
g.text:
<<group renewal delegates>>
Slot Extend Delegates
LettuceSlotExtendDelegate
LettuceSuspendSlotExtendDelegate
extend slot token via server TIME
manual LockExtender path

g.title: slotGroup
g.text:
<<ZSET slot-token primitive>>
LettuceSlotTokenGroup
slotKey: lg:{lockName}
member token, score expiryAtMs
metaKey stores LeaderSlot leaderId
no legacy semaphore dependency

g.title: lettuceSuspendGroup
g.text:
<<coroutine slot group>>
LettuceSuspend Group
LettuceSuspendLeaderGroupElector
uses same SlotTokenGroup primitive
tryAcquireSuspending
NonCancellable slot release

g.title: lettuceLock
g.text:
<<Redis SET NX PX lock>>
LettuceLock
token: Base58 fencing value
SET key token NX PX lease
Lua token unlock / PEXPIRE
async retry uses same token

g.title: lettuceSuspendLock
g.text:
<<coroutine Redis lock>>
LettuceSuspendLock
asyncCommands.set NX PX
delay retry + ensureActive
Lua token unlock / PEXPIRE
suspend native extendDetailed

g.title: scriptRunner
g.text:
<<Lua execution helper>>
RedisScriptRunner
RedisScript.sha1
EVALSHA first
NOSCRIPT falls back to EVAL
sync / async / suspend entrypoints

g.title: redisKeys
g.text:
<<Redis storage contract>>
Redis Runtime Keys
single lock key: SET NX PX
group ZSET: lg:{lockName}
group hash: lg:{lockName}:meta
ACQUIRE evicts expired scores

g.title: classifier
g.text:
<<watchdog error policy>>
LettuceBackendErrorClassifier
RedisCommandTimeout -> transient
RedisConnection -> transient
RedisCommandExecution -> non-transient
other errors delegated
